nasb.text: The end of a matter is better than its beginning; Patience of spirit is better than haughtiness of spirit.

esv.text: Better is the end of a thing than its beginning, and the patient in spirit is better than the proud in spirit.

cnv.text: 事情的結局勝於開端， 存心忍耐的，勝過居心驕傲的。

ccb.text: 事情的结局胜过事情的开端； 恒久忍耐胜过心骄气傲。

csbs.text: 事情的尽头好过事情的开始， 灵里忍耐好过灵里高慢。
